Student funds

NZD $20,000 for each year, plus outward travel costs.

IEC age change

  • The eligibility age will increase from 18–30 to 18–35.

IEC duration

  • Eligible participants may receive a work permit for up to 24 months.

Immigration median wage

From 9 March 2026, the immigration median wage will increase to NZD $35.00 per hour, based on June 2025 data. This affects several AEWV related and family visa settings.
